case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-16-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-11-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-01-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-27-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-16-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED NOV-03-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-27-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
